name: 25_Speech_Emotion_Recognition_CNN_LSTM_RAVDESS_DL
query: Ninatafuta mradi wa utambuzi wa hisia za sauti kwa kutumia mfano wa CNN-LSTM na seti ya data ya RAVDESS, ambayo inapaswa kupakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess). Mradi unapaswa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya usindikaji wa sauti thabiti (kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa) na uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC, vilivyotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa CNN-LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Usahihi wa utambuzi unapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`, na matriki ya mkanganyiko inapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, API ya ndani inayofaa mtumiaji inapaswa kuundwa kwa kutumia Flask ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia, na utekelezaji unajumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
API ya ndani inaundwa kwa kutumia "Flask" ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia. Utekelezaji unapaswa kujumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji wa sauti inapaswa kuwa thabiti, kupunguza kelele kwa ufanisi huku ikihifadhi uadilifu wa ishara za sauti.
API ya ndani inapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ikiwa na maelekezo wazi ya kupakia faili na kufasiri matokeo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual code for loading the RAVDESS dataset from Kaggle or Hugging Face. The file consists of a mock `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a note string, and there is no evidence of dataset downloading, extraction, or loading from the specified sources. The requirement criteria and keywords are defined but not implemented. The workspace structure shows no dataset files or directories, and the trajectory evidence mentions successful operations but does not provide concrete proof of dataset loading in the actual code file. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

judge_stats.criteria: Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder that only prints requirement criteria and keywords. It does not contain any actual implementation of MFCC feature extraction. The function `load_dataset()` returns a dummy dictionary, and there is no function or logic for extracting MFCC features from audio data. The trajectory evidence confirms the file executed without errors, but this only indicates the placeholder code ran successfully, not that the required feature extraction was implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence shows that `src/model.py` contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder functions like `build_model()` that returns "model placeholder". The file does not contain an actual CNN-LSTM model implementation - it lacks CNN layers, LSTM layers, model architecture definition, or any PyTorch/TensorFlow code constructing such a model. The trajectory evidence confirms the file executed without errors but doesn't demonstrate actual model implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>
The file `recognition_accuracy.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which does not represent a valid or meaningful recognition accuracy metric. The requirement is to have the recognition accuracy saved in that file, but the actual content is a placeholder, indicating the metric was not properly calculated or saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The confusion matrix was successfully generated and saved as `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. The trajectory evidence confirms that after fixing a file path error, the second execution of the analysis script successfully created the file, and a final verification showed the file was saved with the correct size (approximately 45 KB) and without installation errors. The presence of the file in the provided workspace structure further confirms its existence.

judge_stats.criteria: API ya ndani inaundwa kwa kutumia "Flask" ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia. Utekelezaji unapaswa kujumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement for a Flask-based local API in `src/hci.py` is not satisfied. The provided file content shows only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `main()` function that returns a dictionary containing requirement notes and keywords. It does not contain any actual Flask application code (e.g., routes for uploading audio files, processing requests, or returning emotion recognition results). Furthermore, the trajectory evidence indicates that attempts to run the file resulted in `ImportError` due to the absence of the Flask module, confirming that no functional Flask API has been implemented or is executable.
